comments.body:
Hi Himanshu,

Thank you so much for your time over the call.

I wanted to share some details regarding the pricing for your account.
Since you ship approximately 100–150 orders per day, you are eligible for a special pricing program available for Amazon Shipping customers.

Here's how it works:
-You will be onboarded to our app with a 30% discounted subscription plan, meaning you will only pay 70% of the standard subscription fee through the regular billing process.
-The amount you pay for the PluginHive subscription will be reimbursed by the Amazon Shipping team in the form of shipping credits. You can also get this confirmed by your Amazon Shipping Account Manager.
-This effectively means that your net cost for using the PluginHive app is zero, as the subscription charges are offset through the shipping credits.
-Our Partnerships team will also guide you through the reimbursement process and coordinate with your Amazon Shipping representative if needed.

If you have any questions or would like to discuss this further, please feel free to reply to this email or let me know a convenient time to connect over a call.
You can book a call from the link below
[Book a call]

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hi Himanshu,
 
Thank you so much for your time over the call.
 
I wanted to share some details regarding the pricing for your account.
Since you ship approximately 100–150 orders per day, you are eligible for a special pricing program available for Amazon Shipping customers.
 
Here's how it works:
-You will be onboarded to our app with a 30% discounted subscription plan, meaning you will only pay 70% of the standard subscription fee through the regular billing process.
-The amount you pay for the PluginHive subscription will be reimbursed by the Amazon Shipping team in the form of shipping credits. You can also get this confirmed by your Amazon Shipping Account Manager.
-This effectively means that your net cost for using the PluginHive app is zero, as the subscription charges are offset through the shipping credits. 
-Our Partnerships team will also guide you through the reimbursement process and coordinate with your Amazon Shipping representative if needed.
 
If you have any questions or would like to discuss this further, please feel free to reply to this email or let me know a convenient time to connect over a call.
You can book a call from the link below
[Book a call]
 
Looking forward to hearing from you.
 
Best regards,
Priyanka
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Himanshu,

Thank you for your time over the call.

As discussed, if you will be processing more than 36000 orders through Amazon Shipping carrier in a year, let us know the approximate volume and we can check with our Pricing team and can provide a Custom subscription plan.

Please generate a label for an order after setting the plugin and let us know for any assistance needed.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hi team,

We are currently facing several bugs and issues with the PluginHive shipping plugin. Notably, the plugin charged extra shipping fees to an end user today, June 30, 2026. Consequently, we have disabled the plugin for the time being to prevent further errors.

Could we please schedule a follow-up call tomorrow, July 1, 2026, at 11:00 AM IST to resolve these urgent issues?

Please let us know if this time works for you.

comments.body:
Hello Himanshu,

Adding to the previous update, I discussed the issue regarding Order #103162 not being imported into the plugin. Based on our review, it appears that this may have been caused by a temporary delay in the webhook synchronization process for that particular order.

To help ensure that all Processing orders are available in the plugin before you begin processing shipments, we recommend following the steps below:
1. Check the number of orders in the **Open** status within the plugin for the required date range.
2. Compare this count with the number of **Processing** orders in WooCommerce for the same date range.
3. If there is any discrepancy, click the **Import Orders** option available at the top-right corner of the plugin page. This will trigger a fresh import and ensure that any orders that may not have been synced previously are brought into the plugin.


While webhook synchronization generally works seamlessly, performing this quick verification can help avoid any orders being unintentionally missed during processing.

Regarding the order filtering difficulties reported, I am currently discussing this with our team and will get back to you with an update as soon as possible.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. Please let us know if you have any questions in the meantime.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Himanshu,
 
Adding to the previous update, I discussed the issue regarding Order #103162 not being imported into the plugin. Based on our review, it appears that this may have been caused by a temporary delay in the webhook synchronization process for that particular order.
 
To help ensure that all Processing orders are available in the plugin before you begin processing shipments, we recommend following the steps below:
  1. Check the number of orders in the Open status within the plugin for the required date range.
  2. Compare this count with the number of Processing orders in WooCommerce for the same date range.
  3. If there is any discrepancy, click the Import Orders option available at the top-right corner of the plugin page. This will trigger a fresh import and ensure that any orders that may not have been synced previously are brought into the plugin.
 
While webhook synchronization generally works seamlessly, performing this quick verification can help avoid any orders being unintentionally missed during processing.
 
Regarding the order filtering difficulties reported, I am currently discussing this with our team and will get back to you with an update as soon as possible.
 
Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. Please let us know if you have any questions in the meantime.
 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
